IsPressureLow.description: True when tire pressure is below the warning threshold.

IsTemperatureHigh.description: True when tire temperature is above the warning threshold.

IsPowerSufficient.description: True when the tire monitoring module has sufficient power.

IsTemperatureHigh.description: True when brake temperature is above the warning threshold.

IsFluidLevelLow.description: True when brake fluid level is low.

IsBrakesWorn.description: True when brake pads are worn.
